text: It is unlawful for any minor who does not possess a valid driver’s license issued under this code to order, purchase or lease, attempt to purchase or lease, contract to purchase or lease, accept, or otherwise obtain, any vehicle of a type subject to registration.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 6.5. MOTOR VEHICLE TRANSACTIONS WITH MINORS [15500 - 15501]
### Chapter 1. Driver’s License Requirements [15500 - 15501]
##### § 15500

It is unlawful for any minor who does not possess a valid driver’s license issued under this code to order, purchase or lease, attempt to purchase or lease, contract to purchase or lease, accept, or otherwise obtain, any vehicle of a type subject to registration.

*(Added by Stats. 1968, Ch. 1020.)*

subsections.text: It is unlawful for any minor who does not possess a valid driver’s license issued under this code to order, purchase or lease, attempt to purchase or lease, contract to purchase or lease, accept, or otherwise obtain, any vehicle of a type subject to registration.
